page_content:
Prerequisite: BIOE331.

Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Fischell Department of Bioengineering department.

BIOE340 Modeling Physiological Systems and Lab (4 Credits)

Topics covered will include cell and general physiology, membrane physiology, blood cells and clotting, circulation, metabolism, respiration, and the nervous system. A lab component will also be included. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in BSCI330 and BIOE331. Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Fischell Department of Bioengineering department.

Credit Only Granted for. BIOE340 or (BSCI440 and BSCI441).
